replics: Miron: Hey, kid, I didn't expect anyone to come to me.
Artem: Hello, I'm confused myself. My name is Artem, and what's yours?
Miron: I'm Miron, an elderly man. I've been retired for the last few years.
Artem: How do you live alone on the island? Where's your family, and why is everything gray?

Miron: Well, I don't know what happened. I only remember playing with my grandson Lev, and he broke a window in the house with a ball. I got angry and scolded him. Lev got upset and ran home, and I went back to my room and fell asleep. I woke up and realized the window was worthless, and Lev is everything to me.

Мирон: Now I live in anxiety, and this grayness is crushing me. The world has become gray, and I've begun to forget what color is. I want to make peace with Lev, but it's too late now—everything is flooded. Artem, help me meet him and explain myself.
Artem: Of course, I'll help you see each other again. How can I do that?
